mapper.select: select id, record_date, meal_type, total_count, success_count, fail_count, status, generate_time, create_by, update_by, deleted, create_time, update_time from meal_plan where record_date = #{recordDate} and meal_type = #{mealType} and deleted = 0 order by id desc limit 1

select id, record_date, meal_type, total_count, success_count, fail_count, status, generate_time, create_by, update_by, deleted, create_time, update_time from meal_plan where record_date = #{recordDate} and meal_type = #{mealType} and deleted = 0 order by id desc limit 1 for update
mapper.update: update meal_plan_customer_item set deleted = 1 where deleted = 0 and customer_plan_id in ( select id from meal_plan_customer where meal_plan_id = #{mealPlanId} and deleted = 0 )
update meal_plan_customer set deleted = 1 where meal_plan_id = #{mealPlanId} and deleted = 0
update meal_plan set deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
